channel.title: MEMCM on Geoff Dixon > Write-Verbose
channel.description: Recent content in MEMCM on Geoff Dixon > Write-Verbose

item.title: Config Manager 'Potential SQL performance issue caused by change tracking retention period'
item.description: If you come across this warning during a Config Manager Current Branch site upgrade, read on for the solution. Warning - Potential SQL performance issue caused by change tracking retention period. This warning was apparently added from CM current branch 1810 or later. Running the pre-requisite check CM Current Branch updates are initiated in the Administration > Updates and Servicing node of the CM console. The pre-requisiste check option will highlight any errors and warnings before the upgrade starts.
